Four Waters
English  ·  free  ·  no login
Four Waters

How do you hold a learning space?

A reflective journey for facilitators, trainers, and youth workers. In about 8 minutes you will receive a personal report and a set of AI prompts built around exactly where you are right now.

What you get at the end: your personal water map, a written reflection on your practice, and three ready-to-use AI prompts tailored to your growth edge — so you can keep going the moment you finish.

Read the story Start the journey

Four waters, one learning self.

This tool reflects how you design, guide, speak, and renew — then gives you the words and prompts to grow further.

How it was born

From a training course to a gentle tool.

T3: Train the Trainer was an Erasmus+ learning journey organised by Independent Youth Association — Lepoglava, Croatia. It explored what it really takes to hold a learning space well: designing with intention, communicating with clarity, reading the group with care, and reflecting honestly when the session ends.

When EKOLiTiKA returned home, the question was how to translate that learning into something shareable. Nature offered the metaphor: still water for structure, a river for group flow, rain for presence and voice, a hidden spring for the values that keep us from going dry.

What you walk away with

A mirror and a next step.

Four Waters does not rank or judge. It offers a clearer question: which parts of your practice are already flowing well, and which need attention before your next learning space asks more from you?

The answer comes as a written personal report. But more importantly, it comes as three AI prompts shaped around your specific growth edge — ready to paste into any AI platform and continue your development immediately.

The four waters

What the journey explores

Each water represents a dimension of your facilitation practice.

🪨 Still WaterDesign & structure
🌊 RiverFacilitation & flow
🌧 RainDelivery & presence
💧 Underground SpringValues & renewal

At the end you will receive written reflection on your strongest water and three AI prompts tailored to where you need to grow.

Your three AI prompts.

These are your most valuable takeaway. Each prompt is shaped around your specific growth edge and has your name already filled in. Add your own context where you see square brackets, then paste into any AI platform — ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, or any other — and continue your development right away.

Take the prompts with you The PDF includes your full report and all three prompts — ready to open on any device.
